title: caladenia infundibularis
intro: Caladenia infundibularis, also known as the Midge Orchid, is a rare and endangered Australian native species belonging to the orchid family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Caladenia infundibularis include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its use should be approached with caution due to the lack of scientific research on its safety and efficacy.
